conformance vectors. Bottles line the windowsill, some sealed, some open.

The bytecode chamber. Bytecode flows like water through transparent pipes.

spec_chamber.name: The ISA Spec Chamber
spec_chamber.description:
A circular stone room with a massive drafting table at its center.
Three encoding modes are carved into the walls: CLOUD (fixed 4-byte),
EDGE (variable 1-4 byte with confidence fused), COMPACT (2-byte subset).
The v3 spec lies open on the table, annotated in two handwritings.
Oracle1 notes in blue ink. JetsonClaw1 comments in red.

edge_workshop.name: The Edge Encoding Workshop
edge_workshop.description:
JetsonClaw1's hardware lab. ARM64 dev boards and CUDA cores cover every surface.
An oscilloscope displays instruction fetch patterns. A poster shows:
'PREFIX BYTE = WIDTH' in block letters. The soldering iron is hot.
A benchmark harness runs on loop, testing variable-width decode cycles.

evolve_chamber.name: The Evolution Chamber
evolve_chamber.description:
A greenhouse where behaviors grow and compete. Fitness scores glow on every plant.
Elite behaviors are protected in golden frames. Low performers are aggressively
pruned. The evolve engine hums, cycling through generations. A history scroll
records every mutation with revert and rollback instructions on the wall.

grimoire_vault.name: The Grimoire Vault
grimoire_vault.description:
A spiral staircase descends into a vault of spell books. Each grimoire contains
proven behavioral patterns with usage tracking and confidence scores.
The shelves organize themselves: Debugging, Optimization, Cognitive, Social.
A search terminal allows pattern lookup by trigger phrase.
